description_long: This is a vintage portable radio with a rectangular yellow body and a prominent black speaker grille on the front right side. The left side of the front panel features a metallic tuning scale, a rotary dial, and two round buttons, with the brand name 'Stiletto' printed in black script. An extendable metal antenna is attached to the top, allowing for manual adjustment to improve signal reception. The sides are plain, with the left end displaying a bold black lightning bolt symbol on a metallic gray panel. The back and top surfaces are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The radio appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and metal, with internal electronic components and likely a battery compartment.
description: A yellow vintage portable radio with a large black speaker, metallic controls, and an extendable antenna. The front features the 'Stiletto' brand and a lightning bolt symbol on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the metallic gray panel with a black lightning bolt symbol and the thin profile of the radio.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the speaker grille, tuning scale, rotary dial, buttons, and 'Stiletto' branding.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the radio's slim yellow body and the protruding antenna.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain yellow back and the full length of the extended antenna.
